input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.3.4
            TITLE: the fuel tank, by design, must not have a variable capacity.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.3.4: The Fuel Tank, by design, must not have a variable capacity.
IC.5.3.4 The Fuel Tank, by design, must not have a variable capacity.

final_answer: IC.5.3.4 The Fuel Tank, by design, must not have a variable capacity.
